notes: First-round ACCEPT. The opus author explicitly designed its count claims to be judge-reproducible (grep-able numbers) - the exact robustness the sonnet-sonnet config only reached after two REVERTs.

The sonnet judge downgraded 6 claims to partially_supported with sharp findings (e.g. 'opens with 113 deferred interfaces' overstated: 107 contiguous + 6 scattered; MIT-license claim resting on a comment line), none rising to REVERT level.
The strict-judge/strong-author pairing produced the most finding-dense verdict without wasting an author retry: downgrades landed as [INFERRED]-style softening in the page instead of gate churn.
